inclusions: Cereals (grains), whether or not in the ear or on the stalk
Wheat, meslin, rye, barley, oats, maize (corn), rice, grain sorghum
Buckwheat, millet, canary seeds, fonio (Digitaria spp.), quinoa (Chenopodium quinoa), triticale, and other cereals
Rice in the husk (paddy), husked (brown) rice, semi-milled or wholly milled rice (whether or not polished or glazed), parboiled rice, and broken rice (heading 10.06)
Quinoa from which the pericarp has been wholly or partly removed to separate saponin, without any other processing (heading 10.08)

exclusions.condition: Grains that have been hulled or otherwise worked (EXCEPT RICE 10.06 and QUINOA 10.08 - Husken brown rice/hulled rice is EXPLICITLY ALLOWED in Chapter 10)
exclusions.action: Redirect to Chapter 11 (Products of the milling industry) or other relevant chapter

exclusions.condition: Sweet corn (maize of the sweet corn variety, Zea mays var. saccharata)
